mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_main_image_no.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO main_image (image_no, file_path, thumbnail_path, priority, created_dt) VALUES (#{imageNo}, #{filePath}, #{thumbnailPath}, #{priority}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT image_no AS imageNo, file_path AS filePath, thumbnail_path AS thumbnailPath, priority, created_dt AS createdDt FROM main_image ORDER BY priority ASC
